materials: Electroetched, machined, welded and colour anodised Al 6061, Colour anodised Al 6061 wood screws
description:
- I really like 6061 its really nice
- 5000 is really nice too:
- 
\f2\b\fs32 \cf2 \cb3 \expnd0\expndtw0\kerning0
Aluminium\'96magnesium alloys
\f1\b0  (
\f2\b AlMg
\f1\b0 ) \'96 standardised in the 5000 series \'96 are {\field{\*\fldinst{HYPERLINK "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aluminium_alloy"}}{\fldrslt \cf4 aluminium alloys}} that are mainly made of aluminium and contain {\field{\*\fldinst{HYPERLINK "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Magnesium"}}{\fldrslt \cf4 magnesium}} as the main alloy element. 

\fs24 \cf0 \cb1 \kerning1\expnd0\expndtw0 - This is for sure the nicest thing ever made. It\'92s so much nicer in person too. Email me if you want to come to my mums house and have a look at it. 
- it really felt like something changed when I made it
- aluminium wood screws are so fucking annoying to use
- Electro-etched, machined, welded and colour anodised aluminium 6061 alongside colour anodised aluminium 6061 wood screws form the highest physical presentation of the poster image from the 2011 fantasy romance film. The glossy cinematic desire finally made material.
